Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team
Attention

Copyright (c) 2026 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Defines the media_state_t state enumeration and the media_state_transition_t transition enumeration that describe the lifecycle state machine of a media instance.

Enumeration Type Documentation

◆ media_state_t

enum media_state_t
Enumerator
MEDIA_STATE_NULL 

Not initialised.

MEDIA_STATE_INITIALIZED 

Initialised but not yet prepared.

MEDIA_STATE_PREPARED 

Resources allocated and ready to stream.

MEDIA_STATE_STREAMING 

Actively processing data.

◆ media_state_transition_t

enum media_state_transition_t
Enumerator
MEDIA_STATE_TRANSITION_NONE 

No transition set yet.
